name: Ostergotland County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gules field of the Ostergotland arms
armed and langued azure detailing on the griffin
silver detailing in the central charge

description: A square red flag charged centrally with a gold griffin rampant from the Ostergotland provincial arms.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Ostergotland County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic province of Ostergotland.

features.symbolism: the gules field of the historic Ostergotland provincial arms
a gold griffin rampant on a red field, the historic emblem of the province of Ostergotland; the griffin holds a rose and is surmounted by a ducal coronet.
